name: Lassi
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the seeds from the cardamom pods and crush them.
2. Blend 3 cups of yogurt, crushed cardamom, and sugar in an electric blender until smooth.
3. Beat the remaining yogurt well in a bowl.
4. Add the blended mixture to the bowl with the beaten yogurt and mix well.
5. Stir in the rose water and nutmeg. Serve in individual glasses.
